label: Precept comp (knows memory thought)
description: Gives a memory thought to a pawn who knows about a history event.

description.label: Description
description.description: Description shown in the ideology editor.

thought.label: Thought
thought.description: Memory thought given to the observer.

thoughtStageDescriptions.label: Thought stage descriptions
thoughtStageDescriptions.description: Override descriptions for each thought stage.

tooltipShowMoodRange.label: Tooltip show mood range
tooltipShowMoodRange.description: If true, the tooltip shows the mood range for each stage.

doerMustBeMyFaction.label: Doer must be my faction
doerMustBeMyFaction.description: If set, whether the event doer must be in the observer's faction for the thought to apply. Absent means no faction filter.

removesThought.label: Removes thought
removesThought.description: Thought that is removed when this thought is added.

onlyForNonSlaves.label: Only for non-slaves
onlyForNonSlaves.description: If true, slaves do not receive this thought.

doerMustBeMyIdeo.label: Doer must be my ideo
doerMustBeMyIdeo.description: If true, the thought only applies when the doer shares the observer's ideology.
